programme.title: Forbidden Science - Love Doll
programme.desc: Forbidden Science is a unique blend of noir science fiction and erotic programming. Set in the near future, the stories revolve around the evil corporation, 4Ever Innovations, whose young and brilliant scientists download and sell memories. They replace those we've lost with clones and devise technology that helps us live out our greatest fantasies; from saving a failed relationship, to creating the perfect lover, to being irresistible to the opposite sex - but sometimes our deepest desires come at a terrible price. 4Ever offers customers the opportunity to live out their fantasies in a virtual world but there are secrets within 4Ever Innovations that may cost you your life.

programme.title: The Blue Realm Ep109: Toxic Invaders
programme.desc: They’re beautiful - and deadly, with venomous spines that resemble a lion's mane. They’re lionfish, a tropical reef species normally found in the Indo-Pacific. Now, they’re wreaking havoc in the Caribbean and Atlantic – all thought to have descended from a handful of aquarium fish carelessly released into the sea. In these regions, they're potentially a greater threat to coral reefs and commercial fish populations than global warming or pollution.

programme.title: Blue World Ep404: Shipwrecks Turned Into Artificial Reefs + Freediving
programme.desc: Blue World visits shipwrecks in Florida to see how they turn into artificial reefs. Then Blue World’s host learns to freedive with Karol Meyer…a world-record freediver.

programme.title: Farm Hero
programme.desc: On this episode, Laura takes a trip to White Oak Pastures in Georgia to meet with pioneer and visionary, Will Harris. After two decades of monocultural farming, Will took his multi-generation farm into a completely new direction by turning it into a regenerative farm. Through trials and tribulations, Will and his family are paving the way for regenerative agriculture and educating the public on the importance of food education.

programme.title: Boom America
programme.desc: The A-Team gets back to work—this time diving into cross-marketing strategies for Advanced Vitality. Over at Hammer Haag, the team discusses launching a gritty new “Micro Dirty Jobs” miniseries to spotlight American manufacturing in action. We’re also introduced to serial entrepreneur Jeff Kline, founder of 1-800-Medigap, who brings a powerhouse presence to the team’s growing roster. Meanwhile, Cindy from Scout & Zoe’s returns for a full brand overhaul with the experts. Newest A-Team member Rudy Mawer steps in with high-level influencer insight and a mission to empower the next generation of entrepreneurs. And finally, Zenith Trek makes bold moves to break into big box retail—with the A-Team guiding the way.

programme.title: Boom America
programme.desc: Kyle Reyes checks in with Advanced Vitality to see how the team’s recommendations have already begun transforming their impact on clients. At Scout & Zoe’s, Cindy unveils a bold new commercial that captures her brand’s quirky spirit while driving sales in a competitive pet market. Over at Zenith Trek, a polished new promo video helps position their innovative product in front of the right audience. And down on the floor at Hammer Haag Steel, it’s lights, camera, action—dirty jobs style—as the crew captures raw, behind-the-scenes footage that showcases their powerful manufacturing capabilities.

programme.title: The Big Reveal
programme.desc: Take flight with The Big Reveal as Don Mann (Surviving Mann), Sheriff Mark Lamb (Surviving Mann), and Laura Zaspel (Farm Hero) visit Air Tractor—America’s iconic maker of crop dusters, firefighting, and military aircraft. Witness the power, precision, and pride behind the company proving that American craftsmanship still soars.

programme.title: Fortress
programme.desc: In the premiere of Fortress, Sheriff Mark Lamb and co-hosts explore America’s urgent need for security—both personal and societal. They meet a passionate team turning donated land into a homestead that feeds and shelters trafficking survivors. Then, CCW Safe steps in to showcase how legal protection for concealed carriers can be the line between justice and ruin. Powerful stories of resilience, protection, and purpose unfold in this compelling first episode.

programme.title: The Price of Power 1969
programme.desc: In The Price of Power, Giuliano Gemma stars in a gripping Spaghetti Western that blends frontier action with political intrigue. Set against the backdrop of President James Garfield’s visit to Texas, a deadly conspiracy unfolds as ruthless enemies plot an assassination. Caught between gunmen, corruption, and betrayal, one man fights to uncover the truth and deliver justice. With explosive shootouts, sweeping style, and echoes of real history, this is a Western where the cost of freedom comes high.

programme.title: Kill Django... Kill First 1971
programme.desc: In Kill Django… Kill First, George Eastman stars as a deadly drifter who rides into a corrupt frontier town ruled by greed and gunmen. When the outlaws push too far, Django answers with blazing six-guns and relentless vengeance. Packed with gritty shootouts, treachery, and Spaghetti Western style, this action-filled tale proves that in the West, the first to draw is the last to survive.

programme.title: The Dawn Rider

programme.title: Bells of Rosarita

programme.title: Sheriff Of Tombstone 1941
programme.desc: Roy Rogers brings law and order to the Old West in Sheriff of Tombstone! Sent to clean up the infamous frontier town, Rogers finds himself facing a crooked mayor and a gang of outlaws determined to run things their way. With the help of loyal allies and a song or two along the trail, he fights for justice and wins the hearts of the townsfolk. Packed with action, music, and Western spirit, it’s Roy at his heroic best.

programme.title: Heroes On Call: The Forgotten Story of America's First Paramedics
programme.desc: In the 1960s, Americans were dying at shocking rates due to inadequate emergency care. Enter Freedom House Ambulance Service: the first paramedics unit in the U.S., run and staffed by Black men and women. This is the origin story of EMS.

programme.title: Silver Linings: Not Your Grandmother's Retirement
programme.desc: Welcome to Lancaster, PA, one of the country's hottest retirement hubs. Here, seniors, from a beauty pageant queen to a 90 year-old swim champion aren’t slowing down; they’re rewriting the playbook and redefining aging in America.

programme.title: Stitch: 10 Heartwarming Tales of Technology Changing Lives
programme.desc: From the internet to artificial intelligence, modern technology has made a massive mark on our society. This episode of Stitch dives into all the ways technology can improve our lives and make a positive impact.

programme.title: Blind Kitchen: Put That Sauce on Anything
programme.desc: Chef Manny Hernandez of Barrels and Boards in Raynham pushes the pace against Chef Ryan Dziki of Wild Fox Pierogi. Will the chefs be able to identify the right ingredients and replicate each other’s sauces before the clock runs out?

programme.title: Local Love: New In Town & Ready For Love
